title: Call-Out to 3GL
text: Call-Out to 3GL You can call out to 3GL functions from ProcScript using the activate ProcSCript statement. The 3GL functions called could be your own functions, functions in existing libraries (legacy code), or even functions in operating system libraries. When using the activate statement, you need to create a signature for your 3GL component and deploy it in a UAR file. You also need to create a shared library, and make the appropriate entries in the [USER_3GL] section of your assignment file. Related Links Specifying Libraries and Functions The [USER_3GL] section of the assignment file describes 3GL shared libraries and/or functions that will be called by your Uniface application.
